# Emscripten license provenance

`LICENSE` is the unmodified license file from Emscripten tag `6.0.0`:

- Source: <https://github.com/emscripten-core/emscripten/blob/6.0.0/LICENSE>
- Raw SHA-256: `620a78084fc7ca97c0b5dea9abf891f3ffcadfdbf305276f099c9c4e12fc1d86`
- Normalized notice-generator SHA-256: `55009efbae65cad4741da6d66d859a4ad471db7b513d4e8451272b0b49e87e20`

The tracked copy makes third-party notice generation independent of whether a particular Emscripten SDK distribution includes its source-tree `LICENSE` file.
